items.text: Jungle Ruins: Mighty Silverfist → +2 weapon-set skill points
The Azak Bog: defeat Ignagduk, the Bog Witch → +30 Spirit (+ guaranteed Uncut Spirit Gem)
Venom Crypts: give the Venom Vial to Servi → choose a permanent Draught (PERMANENT — cannot change!)
Jiquani's Machinarium: Blackjaw, the Remnant → +10% Fire Resistance
Aggorat / Utzaal: get a Sacrificial Heart, sacrifice at the altar → +2 weapon-set skill points
The Molten Vault: defeat Mektul, the Forgemaster → unlock the Reforging Bench (Oswald)
Sandswept Marsh: open the Orok Campfire basket → guaranteed Lesser Jeweller's Orb
